ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "last_stanley_cup_win" INTEGER /* Year of the team's last Stanley Cup win */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the coach */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  "last_team_coached" INTEGER /* ID of the last team the coach coached */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins as a coach */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses as a coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_last_team_coached FOREIGN KEY ("last_team_coached") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the player debuted */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the player */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "series_score" TEXT /* Score of the series */,
  "win_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "lose_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "win_score" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "lose_score" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_win_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("win_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lose_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("lose_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_details" (
  "game_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game detail */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "win_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning coach */,
  "win_goal_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning goal scorer */,
  "lose_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing coach */,
  "win_assist_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted the winning goal */,
  "lose_goal_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored for the losing team */,
  "win_goalie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team's goalie */,
  "lose_goalie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team's goalie */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_win_goal_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("win_goal_scorer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_lose_goal_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lose_goal_scorer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_win_goalie_id FOREIGN KEY ("win_goalie_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_lose_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("lose_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_win_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("win_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_win_assist_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("win_assist_scorer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_lose_goalie_id FOREIGN KEY ("lose_goalie_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-coach assignment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coaching assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coaching assignment */,
  "reason_left" TEXT /* Reason the coach left the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage during the coach's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-player assignment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player assignment */,
  "reason_left" TEXT /* Reason the player left the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player during their tenure */,
  "assists_made" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player during their tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
